scripts.build: npm run build -w @walkcroach/db && npm run build -w @walkcroach/agent-harness && npm run build -w @walkcroach/backend
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @walkcroach/db && npm run build -w @walkcroach/agent-harness
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
